PortraitConfig.title: Portrait: {name}
PortraitConfig.label: Portrait display name
PortraitConfig.note: This name will be used in player UI and can differ from the actor's real name. Leave the field empty to use the actual name.
PortraitConfig.portraitHeightMultiplierHint: Relative height multiplier for this portrait (0 = 0%, 1 = 100%, 2 = 200%, etc.). Default: 1
PortraitConfig.portraitCustomImageHint: Optional custom image displayed instead of the actor's default image
PortraitConfig.emotionDisplayNamePlaceholder: Display name when emotion is active

hidePortraits.name: Do not display portraits
hidePortraits.hint: If enabled, you will not see any character portraits.

gmForcePortraitHeight.name: Force one portrait height for all players
gmForcePortraitHeight.hint: If enabled, the world height below is used for every client instead of each player's personal portrait height.

playerCharactersPanelEnabled.name: NPC Dock: show player character panel
playerCharactersPanelEnabled.hint: Shows the small player character column on the left side of the NPC dock.

gmPortraitHeight.name: Portrait height forced by GM
gmPortraitHeight.hint: Used only when the forced height option is enabled. 0 = bottom strip, 1 = full height.

portraitHeight.name: Portrait height on this client
portraitHeight.hint: Personal portrait height for this client. 0 = bottom strip, 1 = full height. Ignored when the GM forces a world height.

portraitBottomOffset.name: Bottom Offset (px)
portraitBottomOffset.hint: How many pixels to lift the portraits above the bottom of the screen. Portrait height is recalculated based on the remaining screen height.

portraitNameVertical.name: Portrait: name badge vertical position
portraitNameVertical.hint: Vertical position of the name badge on the portrait (0 — top, 100 — bottom).

portraitNameFontSize.name: Portrait: name font size
portraitNameFontSize.hint: Font size of the name badge on portraits (in pixels).

portraitNamesAlwaysVisible.name: Portraits: name visibility
portraitNamesAlwaysVisible.hint: Controls how character names are shown on portraits: never, on hover, or always.

visualNovelMode.name: Visual novel mode
visualNovelMode.hint: If enabled, portrait will fit the screen from bottom to top.

resizeToFit.name: Portraits: resize to fit all portraits
resizeToFit.hint: If enabled, portraits will be resized to fit within their containers.

adjustForSidebar.name: Portraits: account for sidebar width
adjustForSidebar.hint: If enabled, portrait layout will consider the sidebar width.

portraitToneEnabled.name: Portraits: adjust brightness/contrast based on scene darkness
portraitToneEnabled.hint: If enabled, portrait tones will adjust based on scene darkness.

portraitFlipAccess.name: Who can flip portraits
portraitFlipAccess.hint: Controls who can flip portraits with right-click: only the GM or also players who own the character.

portraitDragAccess.name: Who can drag portraits
portraitDragAccess.hint: Controls who can reorder portraits by dragging. Players can drag only portraits they own.

portraitDragAnimate.name: Animate portrait dragging
portraitDragAnimate.hint: If enabled, other clients see the live drag movement. If disabled, only the final portrait swap is synchronized and animated.

emotionPanelVisibility.name: Emotion Panel Visibility
emotionPanelVisibility.hint: Controls who can see the emotion panel when hovering over a portrait.

resetEmotionOnHide.name: Reset emotion when hiding portrait
resetEmotionOnHide.hint: When enabled, the actor's emotion flag will be cleared when their portrait is hidden.

portraitUIToggleVisibility.name: Portrait UI Toggle Button Visibility
portraitUIToggleVisibility.hint: Controls who can see the portrait UI toggle button.

playerPortraitToolbarButton.name: Player portrait toolbar button
playerPortraitToolbarButton.hint: If enabled, players will see an extra toolbar button near the portrait UI to quickly toggle their own portrait.

emotionPanelScale.name: Emotion Panel Scale
emotionPanelScale.hint: Adjusts the overall size of the emotion panel (icon scale).

emotionPanelPosition.name: Emotion Panel Position
emotionPanelPosition.hint: Choose where the emotion panel appears relative to the portrait.

emotionColorIntensity.name: Emotion Color Intensity
emotionColorIntensity.hint: 0 - no color changes from emotions, 1 - full (default)

emotionImageTransitionMs.name: Portrait image transition speed
emotionImageTransitionMs.hint: Duration of the image transition animation for emotions (in milliseconds). 0 means no animation.

displayNameSeparators.name: Name: public-part separators
displayNameSeparators.hint: Characters to cut off NPC names for players. Comma-separated. Example: #,: — then "Karl#Main boss" will show players only "Karl".

actorImagePaths.name: Advanced: actor image paths (CSV)
actorImagePaths.hint: List of Actor dot-path fields separated by commas, used in order as image source. Example: img, prototypeToken.texture.src, system.image

pcActorTypes.name: Advanced: player actor types (CSV)
pcActorTypes.hint: List of Actor types separated by commas to be considered as 'players'. Examples: character, pc, hero, player

npcActorTypes.name: Advanced: NPC actor types (CSV)
npcActorTypes.hint: List of Actor types separated by commas to be considered as NPCs. Examples: npc, adversary, creature, monster, minion

ignoredNpcFolders.name: NPC Dock: ignored actor folders
ignoredNpcFolders.hint: Choose Actor folders whose NPCs should be hidden from the NPC dock. Selecting a parent folder also ignores its subfolders.
ignoredNpcFolders.title: Ignored NPC folders
ignoredNpcFolders.description: NPCs in selected Actor folders will not appear in the NPC dock, favorites column, source folder list, or active portraits mini dock.

portraitFadeMs.name: Portraits: fade-in duration (ms)
portraitFadeMs.hint: Duration in milliseconds for portrait fade-in animation.

portraitMoveMs.name: Portraits: movement duration (ms)
portraitMoveMs.hint: Duration in milliseconds for portrait movement animation.

portraitBlurEnabled.name: Portraits: enable background blur
portraitBlurEnabled.hint: If enabled, the background will blur when portraits are displayed.

portraitBlurStrength.name: Portraits: blur strength (px)
portraitBlurStrength.hint: Strength of the blur effect applied to the background (1-30 pixels).

portraitBlurSpeed.name: Portraits: blur animation speed (ms)
portraitBlurSpeed.hint: Duration of the blur fade-in animation in milliseconds.

portraitFocusBlurEnabled.name: Portraits: enable focus blur
portraitFocusBlurEnabled.hint: If enabled, dimmed portraits will be blurred when a portrait has focus.

portraitFocusBlurStrength.name: Portraits: focus blur strength (px)
portraitFocusBlurStrength.hint: Strength of the blur effect applied to dimmed portraits when focus is active (1-30 pixels).

portraitFocusPortraitBlurEnabled.name: Portraits: enable blur for unfocused portraits
portraitFocusPortraitBlurEnabled.hint: If enabled, portraits that are not in focus will be blurred.

portraitFocusPortraitBlurStrength.name: Portraits: unfocused blur strength (px)
portraitFocusPortraitBlurStrength.hint: Strength of the blur effect applied to unfocused portraits (1-30 pixels).

npcDockFolder.name: NPC Dock: remembered source filter
npcDockFolder.hint: Stores the source selected in the dock itself, such as all folders, current scene, or a folder id. In normal play, change this from the dock dropdown.

showGroupActorsInSources.name: Show group actors in source list
showGroupActorsInSources.hint: If enabled, actors representing groups/parties will be included in the Source dropdown in the NPC dock.

npcDockSearch.name: NPC Dock: remembered search
npcDockSearch.hint: Stores the search text from the dock. In normal play, change this from the dock search field.

npcDockSort.name: NPC Dock: sorting
npcDockSort.hint: Controls how NPC cards are ordered in the dock.

npcDockWidth.name: NPC Dock: panel width
npcDockWidth.hint: Width of the NPC dock panel in viewport width units (e.g., 40 = 40vw).

npcDockRows.name: NPC Dock: NPC rows
npcDockRows.hint: How many NPC rows to show in the dock. Increasing this value also increases the panel height.

performanceMode.name: Performance mode
performanceMode.hint: Disables background and panel blur effects on this client to improve performance.

pcDockFolder.name: NPC Dock: player panel folder
pcDockFolder.hint: Controls which Actor folder is used for the Player Characters panel in the NPC dock. "All players" shows actors from all folders; "Players without folder" shows only actors that are not in any folder.

showActivePortraits.name: NPC Dock: show active portraits mini dock
showActivePortraits.hint: Shows the row of small active portrait circles above the NPC dock.

quick.title: Quick client options
quick.hint: Personal switches that affect only how this client sees the module.

npcDock.title: NPC Dock and player panel
npcDock.hint: Controls the dock layout, its remembered filters, and which Actor folders are shown or ignored.

portraitLayout.title: Portrait layout and size
portraitLayout.hint: Controls how portraits fit on screen, where name badges appear, and whether the GM overrides player sizing.

portraitVisuals.title: Portrait visuals and animation
portraitVisuals.hint: Brightness, focus, blur, movement, and transition timing.

access.title: Access and controls
access.hint: Who can use portrait controls and which UI buttons are visible.

emotions.title: Emotions
emotions.hint: Controls the emotion panel, emotion color strength, and portrait image transitions.

advanced.title: Advanced system compatibility
advanced.hint: Only change these when your game system stores actors or images differently.
